files.desc: Documentation hub, reading order, repository map, product modes, and common commands
Current architecture for desktop screen tutor, bounded autopilot, browser agent, remote WebSocket agent, Tauri windows/events, settings, and platform behavior
Coordinate mapping between physical screens, downsampled screenshots, UIA bounds, overlay CSS pixels, and autopilot native clicks
Fuzzy target matching, UIA/OCR merge rules, bonuses, penalties, ambiguity handling, single-step post-processing, and autopilot safety gating
Screen tutor preflight, continuation state, locator fast path, prompt construction, Ollama/Groq clients, post-inference enforcement, and autopilot continuation
Sarvam text-to-speech and speech-to-text integration for the desktop command bar, including voice behavior with web/autopilot mode
Per-file implementation reference for Rust, React, Python, remote agent, and mobile modules
Browser-agent sidecar, Edge Playwright controller, WebSocket query protocol, registered/generated tools, safety audit, and streaming synthesis
Expo mobile remote controller, WebSocket lifecycle, query UI, streamed results, and power commands
Human and AI reference for desktop agent-mode computer-use actions, Spotify playback, and routing boundaries with mobile/router flows
React route switch for command bar, overlay, and fallback app
Primary desktop command bar with tutor execution, web guidance, bounded autopilot, continuation progress, voice input/readback, settings, and overlay coordination
Fallback/default command UI with basic prompt, settings, and result display
Transparent highlight renderer that maps matched screenshot-space bounds to overlay CSS frames and emits target-clicked events
Pure helpers for visible steps, current pending step, highlightable step, completion decisions, guide history, and summary visibility
Bounded observe-act loop for safe matched clicks, physical coordinate scaling, retry limits, and stop reasons
Runs browser-agent actions before screen guidance for command-bar globe/web mode
Typed frontend wrappers for Tauri commands including run_tutor, native click_screen_point, overlay visibility, command sizing, and settings
Sarvam TTS payload builder, speech content formatter, audio data URL builder, and error parser
Tauri app core: commands, native SendInput clicking, tray, shortcuts, capture exclusion, Python screen worker spawning, overlay events, settings, and global click/Enter polling
WebSocket server on port 9001 for mobile remote commands and streamed agent-router queries
Tauri window definitions for command and overlay plus bundle resources
Screen tutor worker: routing, capture marker, locator fast path, OCR/UIA merge, AI prompt call, matching, search fallback, physical screenshot metadata, and single-step result
Agent sidecar: safe browser planner, direct open/search commands, LLM tool routing, tool execution, repaired generated Playwright tools, and streamed synthesis
Safe JSON browser planner for open_url, web_search, and site_search actions
Persistent Playwright controller that opens visible Microsoft Edge by default
Web Intelligence Layer orchestration for planning, SearXNG retrieval, source acquisition, processing, and synthesis
Async SearXNG JSON search client for the local http://localhost:8888 service
Starts the local SearXNG service exposed on host port 8888
SearXNG settings enabling HTML and JSON search formats
Preflight, chat, and visual prompt builders with continuation history, Blinky UI filtering, compact visible-item format, and single-step rules
Provider router for Ollama and Groq text/vision calls
Local Ollama JSON client using gemma4:e4b defaults, retry logic, and configurable timeout
Groq OpenAI-compatible text and vision client with JSON response format and decommissioned-model fallback
Cross-platform capture strategies, screenshots directory output, and Screenshot dataclass with physical and optimized dimensions
OCR provider registry for WinRT OCR, pytesseract fallback, and mock empty fallback
Fuzzy matcher with exact/partial/fuzzy scoring, control/source/context bonuses, ambiguity diagnostics, and match attachment
Windows UIA extraction with target_pid support and optional unlabeled controls
Active-window resolution, target PID locking, Blinky exclusion, and ignored overlay rectangles
Registered remote-agent tools and argument schemas
Expo remote controller UI for PC connection, browser-agent queries, streamed responses, and power commands
React hook for ws://host:9001 connection lifecycle, JSON response parsing, commands, and queries
Expo 54 app dependencies and start/android/ios/web scripts
Root Bun/Tauri scripts and frontend dependencies
Python dependencies for capture, OCR, UIA, requests, and platform-specific tooling
